eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Oldham, TX; at 10:41 AM ON MAR 11, 2026 Effective until 11:11 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Oldham County Emergency Management: A fire warning has been issued for this area. There is a dangerous wildfire over Boys Ranch or 22 miles NE of Vega. Smoke and fire will present a threat to life and property at Boys Ranch and Tascosa Rd. Be prepared to evacuate quickly if requested by local officials
